samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Prepare cake mix as directed on box
Add the rest of ingredients, and mix well
Pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- chocolate cake
- eggs
- oil
- butter
- sugar
- chocolate
- margarine
- powdered sugar
- water
- vanilla

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350
2. Prepare cake mix as directed on box
3. Add the rest of ingredients, and mix well
4. Pour into greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan
5. Bake 30 to 35 minutes

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Mix cake mix, sugar, brown sugar, oil, eggs and vanilla
Mix flour and nuts in pan
Make a well in center of batter
Cool in pan 10 minutes on rack
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- chocolate cake
- sugar
- brown sugar
- oil
- eggs
- vanilla
- flour
- glaze
- pecans

Instructions:
1. Mix cake mix, sugar, brown sugar, oil, eggs and vanilla
2. Mix flour and nuts in pan
3. Make a well in center of batter
4. Bake at 350 for 30 to 35 minutes
5. Cool in pan
6. Pour glaze over cake
7. Cool in pan 10 minutes on rack

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Add chips and honey; mix well
Roll in powdered sugar, coating well
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- butter
- pecans
- chocolate chips
- honey

Instructions:
1. Melt butter
2. Add chips and honey; mix well
3. Add pecans
4. Mix well
5. Pour into greased cookie sheet
6. Chill 2 hours
7. Break candy in small pieces
8. Roll in powdered sugar, coating well
9. Place on wax paper
10. Break apart and cool
11. Break into pieces

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Add flour, soda, salt and spices
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- shortening
- sugar
- egg
- flour
- soda
- salt
- cinnamon
- applesauce
- nutmeg
- cloves
- raisins
- nuts

Instructions:
1. Combine shortening, sugar and egg
2. Add flour, soda, salt and spices
3. Blend well
4. Add raisins and nuts
5. Bake at 350 for 40 minutes

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Mix eggs, sugar, oil, flour, cocoa, baking soda, salt and vanilla
Pour into greased and floured Bundt pan
Add buttermilk and sugar alternately with butter mixture. <
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- eggs
- sugar
- flour
- cocoa
- baking soda
- buttermilk
- oil
- vanilla
- salt
- butter

Instructions:
1. Mix eggs, sugar, oil, flour, cocoa, baking soda, salt and vanilla
2. Pour into greased and floured Bundt pan
3. Bake at 350 for 40 minutes
4. Cream butter and sugar
5. Add buttermilk and sugar alternately with butter mixture. <
